title: WebSocket not closed before reassignment on reconnect in relay_service.dart
description: In _doConnect(), if _channel.ready throws or the stream.listen setup fails, _channel is left holding a partially-connected WebSocket. On the next reconnect attempt, _channel is reassigned without first calling _channel?.sink.close(). This leaks the underlying WebSocket connection. Fix: in the catch block of _doConnect(), explicitly close _channel before reassigning: await _channel?.sink.close(); _channel = null.
close_reason: close+null _channel at start of _doConnect and on failure catch to avoid leaking partial WebSocket handles
